Spiko EU T-Bills Money Market Fund
Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund
Janus Henderson Anemoy AAA CLO Fund

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: MMO
categories.content: Online games that host large numbers of players.

categories.name: Pump.fun Creator
categories.content: Pump.fun creator tokens are Solana-based memecoins tied to influencers, blending streaming culture with DeFi.

categories.name: Commodities Meme
categories.content: Meme projects tied to commodities in traditional finance.

categories.name: Sticker-Themed Coins
categories.content: Meme coins inspired by Telegram Sticker Packs

categories.name: Tokenized Stock
categories.content: Tokenized stock refers to digital representation of stock on a blockchain platform.

categories.name: Zora Creator
categories.content: Zora Creator Coins are profile-level tokens on the Zora platform, a blockchain-based social network focused on the creator economy. Each Zora account has its own unique Creator Coin, represented by the user's username as the ticker symbol (e.g., $username).

categories.name: Trading Card RWA Platform
categories.content: Trading Card RWA Platforms tokenize physical collectible cards (e.g., Pokémon, sports cards) on a blockchain. The physical cards are stored with a custodian or vault, and each blockchain token represents ownership of the real-world card. This enables features such as fractional ownership and global secondary trading.

categories.name: GBP Stablecoin
categories.content: A GBP stablecoin is a type of cryptocurrency that is designed to maintain a stable value by being pegged to the British pound sterling.

categories.name: TokenSets Ecosystem
categories.content: Interconnected platforms and services built around TokenSets.

categories.name: Leveraged Token
categories.content: Leveraged crypto token is a type of financial instrument hat allows traders to amplify their exposure to the price movements of an underlying cryptocurrency.

categories.name: Yoink.fun Launchpad
categories.content: Tokens launched through Yoink (https://yoinkai.fun/), an agentic launch and trading terminal on Robinhood Chain.

categories.name: Curve Ecosystem
categories.content: Interconnected platforms and services built around Curve Finance.

categories.name: Four.meme Ecosystem (BNB Memes)
categories.content: Four.meme Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via four.meme on BNB Chain.

categories.name: InfoFi
categories.content: InfoFi combines blockchain and AI to monetise and trade attention, influence, and data as assets. It uses decentralised platforms to aggregate, verify, and distribute information, enabling users to be rewarded from their engagement or content.

categories.name: Camelot Launchpad
categories.content: Camelot Launchpad is a platform for crypto projects to hold Initial DEX Offerings (IDOs). Participants are able to gain early access to public and special token sales on the platform.

categories.name: DeFAI
categories.content: DeFAI or AIFI projects leverage AI to streamline and automate DeFi activities such as trading, staking, yield farming, market analysis, and investment optimization.

categories.name: Prediction Market Tools
categories.content: Cryptocurrencies representing projects that function as an application or tooling layer on top of decentralized prediction markets (like Polymarket, Kalshi etc.) to offer enhanced utilities. These platforms do not offer their own prediction bets and markets and instead leverages the liquidity, data, and settlement mechanisms of underlying prediction markets to provide enhanced user experiences, such as trading terminals, copy-trading bots, parlay engines, or social betting interfaces.
